pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.7.1 to support Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.3.x does not support Java 17; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the java.version property to 17 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, Maven may attempt to compile with Java 11 settings or fail to enforce Java 17 compatibility, leading to runtime incompatibilities or build failures on JDK 17.
